PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX wikibase: <http://wikiba.se/ontology#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT(COUNT(?largerState) + 1 AS ?rank) WHERE {
  wd:Q1537 wdt:P2046 ?wisTotal ; wdt:P2927 ?wisWaterPct .
  ?wisTotal wikibase:quantityAmount ?wisTotalAmount .
  BIND(xsd:float(?wisTotalAmount) *(1 -(xsd:float(?wisWaterPct) / 100)) AS ?wisLand)
  ?largerState wdt:P31 wd:Q35657 ; wdt:P2046 ?stateTotal ; wdt:P2927 ?stateWaterPct .
  ?stateTotal wikibase:quantityAmount ?stateTotalAmount .
  BIND(xsd:float(?stateTotalAmount) *(1 -(xsd:float(?stateWaterPct) / 100)) AS ?stateLand)
  FILTER(?stateLand > ?wisLand)
  FILTER(?largerState != wd:Q1537)
}
